description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI/CD that triggers on published releases. The workflow should have two jobs: one to build a Python package distribution on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.10, and another to upload the distribution to PyPI, but currently disabled. The build job checks out the code, sets up Python, caches pip dependencies, installs system and Python dependencies, sets a version, checks the manifest, builds the package, and uploads it as an artifact. The PyPI upload job downloads the artifact and uses a GitHub action to publish to PyPI.
